mapper.select: SELECT er.* FROM expense_report er INNER JOIN emp_employee e ON er.emp_id = e.id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND er.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT er.id, er.report_no as reportNo, e.name as empName, e.dept_id as deptId, d.dept_name as deptName, er.expense_type as expenseType, er.total_amount as totalAmount, er.description, er.status, CASE er.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' ELSE '未知' END as statusText, er.create_time as createTime FROM expense_report er LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON er.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY er.create_time DESC
